title: Luscious Valencian Chickpeas Stew
description: A savory, juicy chickpea stew with Valencian flair, finished with a scoop of orange ice cream for a sweet contrast.
instructions: Rinse chickpeas and soak overnight in water.
In a tagine or Dutch oven, heat olive oil over medium heat and sauté onion, garlic, and carrot until softened.
Add smoked tempeh, paprika, and cumin to the pot and stir for 2 minutes.
Pour in vegetable broth, diced tomatoes, bay leaf, and bring to a boil.
Add chickpeas and potatoes, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 45 minutes until chickpeas are tender.
Stir occasionally, season with salt and pepper to taste, and adjust consistency with water if needed.
Ladle stew into bowls, garnish with fresh parsley, and serve hot.
Offer a scoop of orange ice cream on the side for a sweet contrast.
